Class GenericCustomer

java.lang.Object
RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Customer
public class GenericCustomer extends Object implements Customer
A GenericCustomer is a customer with randomly assigned attributes such as shape, color, and name. The customer will also generate a random order consisting of randomly selected toppings up to maxPick. The class also includes a patience timer controlling how long the customer will wait before leaving.

  • Method Details

    • getOrder

      public ArrayList<Toppings> getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings> ingredientsList, int maxPick)
      Generates a random order for the customer by selecting random toppings from the available ingredient list until maxPick.
      Specified by:
      getOrder in interface Customer
      Parameters:
      ingredientsList - : List of all possible toppings.
      maxPick - : Maximum number of toppings this customer may choose.
      Returns:
      a list of toppings that make up the customer's order
